description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Release that runs on workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on push to release/* branches when VERSION or tags v* change. The workflow should have two jobs: release-to-ecr and release-to-dockerhub, both running on a docker environment. For each job, checkout the repository at the specified commit or tag, then build and push a Docker image with a tag derived from the VERSION file to either AWS ECR or DockerHub.
